queries.question: For Global Corp, show both the independent director and executive manager personnel.
queries.sql:
SELECT Board_Members.MemberName 
FROM Board_Members JOIN Organizations ON Board_Members.OrganizationID = Organizations.ID
WHERE (Board_Members.Role = "Independent Director" OR Board_Members.Role = "Executive Manager") AND Organizations.Name = "Global Corp"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?membername WHERE {
  ?board_members a :Board_Members .
  ?organizations a :Organizations .
  ?board_members p:hasOrganizations ?organizations .
  ?board_members p:MemberName ?membername .
  ?board_members p:Role ?role_w .
  ?board_members p:Role ?role_w2 .
  ?organizations p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?role_w) = "Independent Director" || STR(?role_w2) = "Executive Manager")) && STR(?name_w) = "Global Corp"))
}

queries.question: Show all the people in independent director roles, also show the executive manager(s) of Global Corp.
queries.sql:
SELECT Board_Members.MemberName 
FROM Board_Members JOIN Organizations ON Board_Members.OrganizationID = Organizations.ID
WHERE Board_Members.Role = "Independent Director" OR Board_Members.Role = "Executive Manager" AND Organizations.Name = "Global Corp"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?membername WHERE {
  ?board_members a :Board_Members .
  ?organizations a :Organizations .
  ?board_members p:hasOrganizations ?organizations .
  ?board_members p:MemberName ?membername .
  ?board_members p:Role ?role_w .
  ?board_members p:Role ?role_w2 .
  ?organizations p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER((STR(?role_w) = "Independent Director" || (STR(?role_w2) = "Executive Manager" && STR(?name_w) = "Global Corp")))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Provide the independent directors and executive managers of Global Corp.
